title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 6 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 6 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 6 2026
summary:
Main
Iron ore prices strengthened significantly in today's trading, with the benchmark I2609 futurescontract closing at 816 RMB/ton, up 2.84% from the previous trading session. Spot port prices rose by 10-18 RMB/ton compared to the prior day. Traders showed increased quoting activity, while steel mills mainly purchased for essential needs with limited inquiries; overall spot market transactions remained subdued.
